top_5_fixes: Standardize evidence tags across scorecard, KPI claims, and roadmap dependencies with a controlled enum (not only in competitor proofs).
Add automated validation rules to require traceable evidence IDs/SourceTags for all externally-facing quantitative claims.
Tighten consistency checks between risk triggers and next-action outcomes via machine-checked RiskID linkage coverage.
Add schema-level pattern constraints for DataSourceID/EvidenceID formats to improve reproducibility and audit parsing.
Include a deterministic evidence index artifact per run (in addition to manifest) mapping each major claim to source, owner, and refresh cadence.
